input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #7995 [Automation] javac compile fails for com.graphql-java:graphql-java:2018-07-30T00-23-12-bfee885; label=fails-javac-compile; body_chars=8015

risks: The compile failure appears to be API drift from the 19.7 scaffold: this version's SchemaParser parses File, Reader, or String, not InputStream; PropertyDataFetcher lacks setUseSetAccessible/setUseNegativeCache; DataFetchingEnvironmentImpl lacks newDataFetchingEnvironment().
Tests should be adapted to the 2018 timestamp API, but that is test-code generation work rather than deterministic setup.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: graphql-java 2018-07-30T00-23-12-bfee885 is a standalone in-memory GraphQL engine; its POM declares only normal compile transitive dependencies and its documented usage is schema parsing/execution without Docker, external services, environment variables, or system properties.
